zh.lifeSummary: 當John Neville於1337年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親Ralph Neville46歲，母親Alice de Audley38歲。他於1357年7月與Maud de Percy在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1369年被列為knight of the garter。他去世於1388年10月17日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Neville于1337年出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，他的父亲Ralph Neville46岁，母亲Alice de Audley38岁。他于1357年7月与Maud de Percy在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1369年被列为knight of the garter。他去世于1388年10月17日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Neville was born in 1337, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, his father, Ralph Neville, was 46 and his mother, Alice de Audley, was 38. He married Maud de Percy in July 1357, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. In 1369, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as knight of the garter. He died on 17 October 1388, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Durham Cathedral, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Neville est né en 1337, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Alice de Audley, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Percy en juillet 1357, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. En 1369, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight of the garter. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1388, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Durham Cathedral, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Neville 1337 in Raby Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Neville 46 und seine Mutter Alice de Audley 38. Er hat im Juli 1357 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England Maud de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1369, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight of the garter aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1388 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Durham Cathedral, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Neville è nato il nel 1337 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, il suo padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Audley, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Percy nel luglio 1357, nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1369, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight of the garter. Morì il 17 ottobre 1388, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Durham Cathedral, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Nevilleが1337年にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは46歳，母Alice de Audleyは38歳であった。1357年7月にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルでMaud de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1369年，32歳の時，職業はknight of the garterと記録されている。彼は1388年10月17日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムダルハム カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: John Neville(이)가 1337년 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Audley(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1357년 7월 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 Maud de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1369년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knight of the garter이었다. 그는 1388년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Neville nasceu em 1337, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Audley, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Percy em julho de 1357, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1369, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight of the garter. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1388, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Durham Cathedral, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Neville родился в 1337 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Audley, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Percy июль 1357 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1369 году, в возрасте 32 лет,  он работал по профессии knight of the garter. Он умер 17 октября 1388 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности дурам кэтедраль, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Neville nació en 1337, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Alice de Audley, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Maud de Percy en julio de 1357, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1369, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era knight of the garter. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1388, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Durham Cathedral, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
